text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kashiwa Kinen. Last year, Hokko Tarumae
won this race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, inside the paddock, there is no sign of
the previous year's champion.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae... I really wanted to run against her
today, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I guess she's still far from being in peak condition.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
She's returned more or less to her daily routine
after Dubai, but racing is still...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it seems Tarumae is dealing with some kind of
mild tummy pain.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It's not just being tired from traveling overseas. It
seems she brought home some sort of stomach
bug.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see. My feng shui readings did predict mild
health issues.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae must be feeling down. I'll have to...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Cheer up, Rickey! You're not going to make
Tarumae any happier with you looking so glum.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You won't help the fans expecting to see an
exciting race either.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Acute...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. You might be concerned right now, but
try to take a step back and see the bigger
picture.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Someday, you'll look back on this time fondly.
The world is funny like that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
"See the bigger picture," huh... You're right,
Acute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Me acting depressed isn't going to cheer anyone
up! Besides...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae isn't my only strong rival. You are too,
Acute!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You're not wrong. I've run a lot more races than
you after all.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
My hustle will be so overwhelming, you won't
have the chance to worry about Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll run my best too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae may be absent, but Copano
Rickey still has a strong rival in Wonder Acute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to lose, both for my own sake and
for Tarumae's. And there's another reason on top
of that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Today's the day!
